positive: A whimsical, neo-Victorian botanical portrait featuring a stylized celestial arrangement. The main subject is a perfectly symmetrical, blooming cluster of bioluminescent flowers and intertwined lunar vines, surrounding a central, ethereal crescent moon motif. The style is intricate, high-contrast line art mixed with subtle gradient washes, reminiscent of deep engraving and scientific illustration. Use a limited, sophisticated color palette of deep midnight blue, antique gold, soft lavender, and creamy ivory. The composition must be perfectly centered and designed with clear negative space for print placement, emphasizing strong silhouettes and elegant symmetry. The overall mood should be magical, timeless, and elegant. Art Deco influence, detailed etching, symmetrical mandala composition, high contrast, clean vector lines, apparel print design, isolated on a solid white background.
negative: blurry, artifacts, poor quality, low resolution, text, watermark, signature, blurry background, messy, out of focus, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, gradients (unless intentional), logos, trademarks, copyrighted characters, people
